textByHashes.908eee5a4d209dc4e322c340d12003467c4cf469: Oh sorry, I was somewhere else entirely!
textByHashes.297de1063c216dedbdb5cc057b405895cbd7adf9: I'm just watching the debris wash up at the shore here.
textByHashes.10656a4afc7086510667f4387b553a0f2a6b6c53: Oh, yes! All sorts of things get washed up by the storms. Aside from the usual materials, I've seen some interesting trinkets including odd looking books and fish preservation barrels.
textByHashes.d1751597ca23e16094bb5700ee414719b27bc147: If you help in the fight against Tempoross, the Captain's said you can help yourself to anything that washes up.
textByHashes.b7ae9126a0c059f5a799d204ff44cb34c923af52: A net may be of use to you. Speak to me if you need one.
textByHashes.2ace172c71a276078cb77adfb0cd9ee356a7c383: Sorry, I'm quite busy preparing to face Tempoross. Captain Pudi by the dock can answer any questions you might have.
textByHashes.6ef6ef6066a98ba7ca632779aec87693e824c768: Um... no, I don't want your damp egg, thanks...
textByHashes.e6cf6081e267e16187cf51709d0996c2287c0445: This is some comfort to be sure.
